mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO cat_mesh_descriptor ( id, ui, name, descriptor_class, scope_note, annotation, previous_indexing, public_mesh_note, consider_also, date_created, date_revised, date_established, active_status, mesh_version, metadata, version, created_at, updated_at, deleted ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.ui}, #{item.name}, #{item.descriptorClass}, #{item.scopeNote}, #{item.annotation}, #{item.previousIndexing}, #{item.publicMeshNote}, #{item.considerAlso}, #{item.dateCreated}, #{item.dateRevised}, #{item.dateEstablished}, #{item.activeStatus}, #{item.meshVersion}, #{item.metadata, typeHandler=com.baomidou.mybatisplus.extension.handlers.JacksonTypeHandler}, 0, NOW(6), NOW(6), 0 )
